articles.title: UK Leaders Argue About a New Job for Lord Mandelson
articles.summary: Some important people in the UK government are arguing about a new job for a man named Lord Mandelson. He was supposed to be the UK's ambassador to the US, but he had to leave because he was friends with a bad person. The prime minister, Sir Keir Starmer, said sorry for giving him the job. Now, some people think the prime minister did not tell the truth about how they checked Lord Mandelson before giving him the job. The Conservative leader, Kemi Badenoch, wants a special group to look into this. But some Labour party members think this is a waste of time and money. They say it's just to make the government look bad before local elections. The Speaker of the House will decide if there should be a vote about starting an investigation. If most Labour MPs vote against it, the investigation won't happen.

articles.title: King Charles III Will Be Safe During US Visit, Says President Trump
articles.summary: President Donald Trump says King Charles III will be very safe when he visits the United States. The King and Queen are coming for a four-day state visit. They will start in Washington, D.C., at the White House. President Trump and his wife Melania will greet them. The visit happens after a scary event. A man with a gun got into a place where President Trump was. But no one was badly hurt. The President says the White House is a very safe place. The King and Queen called the Trumps to say they were sorry about the scary event. The visit is important for the United Kingdom and the United States. It will help them be friends again. The King will also go to New York to visit the 9/11 Memorial. There are many British and American flags around the White House. The visit will show that the two countries are good partners.

articles.title: UK's Healthy Years Get Shorter
articles.summary: A new report says that people in the UK are spending fewer years in good health. In the last ten years, the number of healthy years has dropped by about two years. Now, both men and women can expect to be healthy only until they are about 61 years old. The report says that poverty, bad housing, and being very overweight are some of the reasons. The COVID-19 pandemic also made things worse. The report found that people in rich areas can have about 20 more healthy years than people in poor areas. For example, in Richmond, London, men can be healthy until 69 and women until 70. But in Blackpool, men are healthy only until 51. In Hartlepool, women are healthy only until 51. London was the only place where healthy years got better. The report says this is a big problem and the government should do something to help people be healthier.

articles.title: Fire at LGBT+ Club Leads to Arrest
articles.summary: A man was arrested for starting a fire at an LGBT+ nightclub called Pink Punters in Milton Keynes, UK. The fire happened early Sunday morning while many people were inside. Everyone got out safely, and no one was hurt. The police are investigating why the fire was started. The owner of the club said he was sad the building was destroyed but happy that everyone was safe. He promised to rebuild the club. Witnesses said the fire spread quickly, and staff helped people leave quickly. The club has been a safe place for the LGBT+ community for many years.

articles.title: Palestinians Hold Local Elections in Gaza and West Bank
articles.summary: Palestinian leaders held local elections in a town called Deir al-Balah in Gaza and in the West Bank. They said the elections were a success and a step toward having a bigger election for a president. The elections were for local councils that take care of things like water, roads, and electricity. In Gaza, about 23 out of 100 people voted. In the West Bank, about 56 out of 100 people voted, which is more than half a million people. The group that runs the Palestinian government, called Fatah, won most of the races. Another group called Hamas, which controls part of Gaza, did not run for election and did not stop the vote. The leaders hope to hold more elections in Gaza in the future.

articles.title: The Biggest Art Theft in History
articles.summary: In 1990, two men dressed as police officers tricked a guard and stole 13 artworks from a museum in Boston, USA. The paintings are worth over $500 million. The thieves cut paintings from their frames, including works by famous artists like Vermeer and Rembrandt. The museum still has the empty frames hanging on the walls. The crime has never been solved, but a former FBI agent wrote a book naming the people he thinks did it. The museum owner, Isabella Stewart Gardner, wanted everything to stay the same forever, so the empty frames remind us of the stolen art. A reward of $10 million is offered for information.
